feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: What five year old me thought my pikachu would look like after hyper training it
She spoke for all the drivers
entry.content: She spoke for all the drivers

entry.title: Is it hatred or merely population control?
How about a story about an MMA event on the Whitehouse lawn
How do you like dem apples?
Geh motivations & the dead family prophesy
Libs loved him, now they HATE him..
Making them is the fun part
Not about you OR the boys
UN is a useless bunch of bureaucrats
Not how anyone thinks of Over the Hedge really ending
Idc that skulls of my enemies aren't dishwasher safe
You go to jail and you go to jail and you go to jail.
Pokemon go players doing more for america then librards
The dumber you are, the less likely you are to recognize your own hypocrisy
They won’t leave me alone until I finish reading them the constitution
Everyone knows it's a repost and you're the only one bothered by it, Karen
I fell asleep 5 times watching Titanic
All in the Family with a twist
It's like "owning" land in America that can be taken away from you on a whim
That cup is filled with baby oil.
I need to stop getting Costco sized shampoo bottles
Up to 85% of the rapes in Britain go unreported.
entry.content: Up to 85% of the rapes in Britain go unreported.

entry.title: America isn't perfect, but it's the best out there
